entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A legume crop exported by ICRISAT and susceptible to seed-borne diseases

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: An oilseed crop exported by ICRISAT and susceptible to seed-borne diseases

entities.name: SEED-BORNE DISEASES
entities.description: Diseases transmitted through seeds of economic importance

entities.name: IARC
entities.description: International Agricultural Research Centers involved in the exchange of seeds

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International Center for Research in the Semi-Arid Tropics that exports crop samples

entities.name: PATHOGENS
entities.description: Biological agents that can be transmitted by seed and cause disease

entities.name: FUNGI
entities.description: Seed-borne organisms that cause yield losses and other negative effects

entities.name: BACTERIA
entities.description: Seed-borne organisms that cause yield losses and other negative effects

entities.name: VIRUSES
entities.description: Seed-borne organisms that cause yield losses and other negative effects

entities.name: YIELD LOSSES
entities.description: Reduction in crop productivity caused by seed-borne pathogens

entities.name: SEED GERMINATION
entities.description: The process of seed sprouting, which can be reduced by pathogens

entities.name: DETERIORATION IN STORAGE
entities.description: The degradation of seed quality during storage increased by pathogens

entities.name: HUMANS
entities.description: Living beings affected by toxic metabolites of mold fungi

entities.name: ANIMALS
entities.description: Living beings affected by toxic metabolites of mold fungi

entities.name: TOXIC METABOLITES
entities.description: Harmful substances produced by certain mold fungi

entities.name: MOLD FUNGI
